area.value: you and up to four willing creatures, none of whom can be on their home plane

description.value: This spell functions similarly to plane shift, but instead of transporting the targets to a destination near an intended location on a specific plane, anywhere but here transports affected creatures to a random plane. A creature can be affected by anywhere but here only if it is currently not on its home plane (although targets can, by chance, end up traveling to their home plane as a result of this spell). Subjects always appear in a location that is not inherently harmful, but the exact destination is otherwise random. The specific plane is determined by the table below; the location on the destination plane where the transported creatures arrive is completely subject to the GMâs whim. d% Planar Destination 1â7 Abyss 8â14 Abaddon 15â20 Hell 21â24 Shadow Plane 25â28 Fey World 29â35 Maelstrom 36â42 Boneyard 43â49 Axis 50â56 Ethereal Plane 57â63 Elysium 64â70 Nirvana 71â77 Heaven 78â84 Astral Plane 85â90 Random demiplane 91â95 Material Plane (random world) 96â100 GMâs choice A creature that is transported by anywhere but here cannot be affected by a subsequent casting of anywhere but here for 24 hours afterward (but can be affected normally by other forms of planar travel).
